raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this formal complaint against American Express for their refusal to close a credit card account that was fraudulently opened as part of a deceptive sales scheme by XXXX XXXX XXXX in XXXX. During a high-pressure sales presentation with XXXX, I was misled into opening an American Express credit card. I was told that this account was a necessary part of the timeshare purchase process and was assured that the timeshare could later be sold back to the company through a buy-back program. Both of these claims turned out to be completely false. 

The credit card was presented as a formalitysomething required to " secure '' the dealnot as a traditional line of credit I was expected to pay off over years. I would never have agreed to open this account if I had been told the truth. These were not simple misunderstandingsthey were deliberate misrepresentations made to secure my financial commitment under false pretenses. 

I have disputed this account with American Express, making it very clear that the charges stemmed from fraud and deception. Their response was entirely dismissive. They cited a contract return from XXXX but completely ignored the fact that the contract itself was induced by fraud. I am now being held liable for thousands of dollars on an account that never should have existed in the first place.
